title: 主线选股与产业链拆解
description: 用于 Agent 主导的 A 股主线研究、产业链拆解、A 股公司映射和候选池分层。协议只输出研究状态、证据强弱、缺口和跟踪清单，不输出交易指令、仓位建议或自动化执行信号。
forbidden: Do not issue direct buy/sell advice, position sizing, or automated execution instructions
Do not convert feature scores into trading signals
Do not treat concept membership, hot ranks, or limit-up behavior as company business exposure without filings, evidence, or accepted knowledge
Do not use reports/runs as factual source
Do not use sources outside the evidence source_type whitelist
Do not state unsupported certainty when evidence, mart data, or knowledge is missing
